title: Observer Disagreement World — Runtime Configuration Schema
description: Placeholder schema. No runtime implementation exists yet.

scene.description: Primary scene. The straight-reference scene runs in parallel for comparison.

reference_scene.description: Straight-transport reference scene for disagreement comparison.

pose_key.description: Named pose. 'basic_visual_offaxis_observe_v0_pre' matches the promoted artifact (480x270, off-axis).

allow_free_look.description: Free look changes the disagreement fraction. Enabling this is the 'angular dependence' experiment.

display_mode.description: Which render to show. 'disagreement_delta' computes and displays the per-pixel classification diff.

disagreement_color.description: Color encoding for the disagreement delta overlay.

geom_to_escaped.description: Color for pixels that were geom_hit in straight but escaped in curved.

escaped_to_geom.description: Color for pixels that were escaped in straight but geom_hit in curved.

unresolved.description: Color for pixels where at least one transport hit budget limit.

unchanged.description: Color for pixels classified identically by both transports.

expected_metrics.description: Reference values from the promoted artifact. Used by the validation HUD to flag unexpected deviations.

show_pixel_count_hud.description: Show live disagreement pixel count, matching the artifact's measured value.
